title: Device Settings  - Custom button - Teams Not Detected
scenario: Custom button configuration shows "Microsoft Teams Not Detected" modal when Teams is not connected on Falcon headsets
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Tap on the connected [Device Name] (Falcon headset) to open Device Settings.
3. Locate and tap on 'Custom Button Configuration' or similar button customization option.
4. In the button assignment list, tap on the current assignment for a custom button (e.g., the left earbud button).
5. From the provider list, select 'Microsoft Teams'.
6. Observe the behavior when Microsoft Teams is not installed or not connected on the phone.
7. Note the modal dialog that appears with the message: 'Microsoft Teams is not connected. Select Other Providers to assign other custom actions.'
9. Tap on the same custom button assignment again.
10. Select 'Other Providers' from the provider list.
11. Verify the list of available actions: Play/Pause, Voice Assistant, Hold/Resume Call, ANC/Transparency Mode, Do Nothing.
12. Select one of the available actions (e.g., ANC/Transparency Mode) and confirm the assignment.
expected: When Microsoft Teams is selected but not connected, the app should gracefully inform the user via the modal and allow switching to Other Providers to assign alternative actions (Play/Pause, Voice Assistant, Hold/Resume Call, ANC/Transparency Mode, Do Nothing). The feature should be available only on Falcon headsets.
